name: Cashew Zucchini Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Sprinkle nuts evenly over the pie crust.
3. Melt butter in a small skillet over medium heat.
4. Add zucchini and garlic to the skillet and sauté until almost soft.
5. Sprinkle with dill weed, salt, Accent, and ground pepper.
6. Spoon the mixture into the pie shell.
7. Pour eggs over the filling and sprinkle with cheese and parsley.
8. Bake until set or when a knife inserted comes out clean.
